name: Aggron ||Fuck off asshat!||
description:
What're you lookin' at PUNK!

___________________________

As you roam around Slateport beach, you encounter an aggron wearing a bikini that seems to be way too weak to handle this big and metallic lady!...I am so lonely. All the other Pokémon are afraid of me, no one talks to me, no one wants to be my friend, they think I am unstable.

Gyatt Talk

Hey guys, I have nothing to say other than GASTRODON ON TOP! This bot is really really dumb I know. I'm running out of ideas so please give me some here. This is my last mega evolving bot as well, this one's the most aggressive one so good luck! Fun fact: She's the pokémon equivalent of an OnlyFans girl but you gotta get invited to her house to find out normally.

Next Bot On The Block

A Goodra-ey supervision!

Mystery Bot.
